name: Fresh Hot Salsa
recipeIngredient: 24 Assorted hot peppers (Hungarian Wax, Serrano, Anaheim or Cayenne)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil.
2. Drop in tomatoes and scald briefly, then drain and remove skins.
3. Chop the tomatoes finely and transfer to a large colander.
4. Wear rubber gloves, trim tops off peppers, and chop coarsely.
5. Add the chopped peppers to the tomatoes.
6. Chop onions and tomatillos finely and add them to the mixture with the tomatoes/peppers.
7. Stir in salt and allow the mixture to sit and drain for 2-3 hours.
8. After draining, give a few good stirs.
9. Add olive oil, vinegar, and herbs.
10. Transfer to a large pot and cook over medium heat until it bubbles.
11. Enjoy fresh or pack into hot, sterilized jars and process for canning.
